claims.claim: Cody Duran's performance tends to fade after the first round against dangerous opponents.
claims.quote: it just feels like against these younger, very dangerous opponents, it all just kind of starts to fade after the very first round.

claims.claim: Aleandro Costa possesses high-level body-striking ability.
claims.quote: he rips the body just about as good as anybody in the UFC right now.

claims.claim: Matt Schnell lacks durability.
claims.quote: Matt Snell who's part of the chinny chin chin club who has no durability whatsoever.

claims.claim: Short-notice fights have less impact on performance in the flyweight division due to the fighters' high cardio.
claims.quote: If there's ever a division to where short notice is just not really going to affect a guy, it would be the flyweight division. These guys are Energizer bunnies.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra leaves himself vulnerable to straight punches due to his wide, looping striking style.
claims.quote: he leaves so many openings to allow a guy to throw good straight shots down the middle to be able to find the chin.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra is vulnerable to being taken down.
claims.quote: he also leaves himself very vulnerable to being taken down

claims.claim: Zachary Reese has poor defensive striking and keeps his chin exposed.
claims.quote: Zachary Reese's defense sucks. His chin is up in the air. He doesn't move really well when shots are coming his way.

claims.claim: Ryan Gandra has more power than Zachary Reese.
claims.quote: I think Gandra is more dangerous. He's got more power.

claims.claim: Zachary Reese is very hittable.
claims.quote: Zachary Reese is very hitable.

claims.claim: Zachary Reese's defensive posture is poor with his chin held high.
claims.quote: Zachary Reese's defense sucks. His chin is up in the air.

claims.claim: Damen Panass has a reach and height advantage over Zachary Reese.
claims.quote: He's going to have a little bit of a reach advantage. He's going to be a little bit taller.

claims.claim: Cesar Almeida does not move his head well.
claims.quote: He doesn't move his head very well

claims.claim: Cesar Almeida relies on a shell defense that does not translate well to MMA.
claims.quote: he leaned on kind of the shell hiding behind the gloves in kickboxing to where that doesn't translate the same in MMA

claims.claim: Damen Panass is the more well-rounded MMA fighter compared to Cesar Almeida.
claims.quote: I think Pass is the better MMA fighter.

claims.claim: Cesar Almeida's gas tank suffers when he is taken down and forced to work.
claims.quote: if you take him down and you make him work, not only does his output slow down, but his gas tank starts to take a little bit of a hit.

claims.claim: Bang Bang Wong has improved her takedown defense.
claims.quote: I like the improvements that we've seen in the takedown defense.

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez lacks the striking power to gain the respect of Bang Bang Wong.
claims.quote: I just don't know that Tracy has has the danger on the feet to be able to gain the respect of Bang Bang Wong.

claims.claim: Kong Wang has improved her takedown defense.
claims.quote: I like the improvements that we've seen in the takedown defense.

claims.claim: Kong Wang has a striking advantage over Tracy Cortez.
claims.quote: She's got the striking advantage.

claims.claim: Tracy Cortez lacks the power to punish Kong Wang for aggressive movement.
claims.quote: I don't think Tracy has, you know, power like someone like a Gabriella Fernandez to be able to make, you know, Kong Wang pay

claims.quote: excellent Muay Thai, very, very sharp boxing.

claims.claim: Kai Kamaka III has a grappling advantage over Luke Riley.
claims.quote: I think in this fight, he has the advantage with the grappling.

claims.claim: Luke Riley is hittable and does not have the best defensive striking.
claims.quote: Luke Riley is hitable. I don't think his defense is the best

claims.quote: Giannis's takedown defense looks excellent

claims.quote: he's got some of the most hand speed that we've ever seen in the lighterweight classes.

claims.claim: Adrien Yanez has a relatively chinny durability profile.
claims.quote: Adrien Giannis is a guy that is relatively chinny as well.

claims.claim: Cody Garbrandt's confidence has declined since his loss to T.J. Dillashaw.

claims.quote: really good calf kicks as well.

claims.claim: Adrien Yanez's takedown defense is excellent.
claims.quote: Giannis's takedown defense looks excellent, right?

claims.quote: Garbrand slow output.

claims.quote: Now he's at Jackson Wink training with Jonathan Jones.

claims.claim: Elisha Ellison is not of UFC caliber.
claims.quote: I don't think he's UFC caliber, right?

claims.quote: He doesn't fight very well from range. He charges into range.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney's performance level drops significantly after the first two minutes of a fight.
claims.quote: outside of that, he doesn't look like a ranked fighter outside of those couple minutes, man.

claims.claim: Terrence McKinney's gas tank is limited to the first two minutes of a fight.
claims.quote: Yes, he looks like a top five lightweight for the first two minutes. But outside of that, he doesn't look like a ranked fighter outside of those couple minutes, man.

claims.claim: Bobby Green's ground game is underrated.
claims.quote: I think that his ground game is criminally underrated

claims.quote: I know that Roy V is coming off of two losses, right?

claims.claim: Lonnie Kavanaugh's cardio has improved significantly since his previous fights.
claims.quote: a fight before you showed signs of fatigue and then you came back about six months later. Your cardios never looked better.

claims.quote: This performance against Brandon Moreno is one of the most impressive performances I believe that we have ever seen in the UFC.

claims.claim: Lonnie Kavanaugh has excellent takedown defense.
claims.quote: his takedown defense has looked outstanding to where his takedown defense has looked really good.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is more vulnerable to damage now than he was a few years ago.

claims.quote: I also think it's possible that that slows down Max. It makes his gas tank a little bit worse, makes his output a little lower

claims.claim: Attacking the lead leg is a proven weakness of Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: that is the one weakness that we've seen from Connor other than when people talk about him fatiguing in the cardio is attacking the lead leg

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will suffer a significant adrenaline dump due to his long absence from competition.
claims.quote: he's been away for forever and I think that he's going to suffer a big adrenaline dump.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's primary strategy will be attacking McGregor's lead leg to compromise his base.
claims.quote: I think Max Holloway's biggest weapons in this fight are going to be attacking the lead leg of McGregor

claims.quote: that is the one weakness that we've seen from Connor other than when people talk about him fatiguing in the cardio is attacking the lead leg, take away his base

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will suffer from a significant adrenaline dump due to his long layoff.
claims.quote: he's been away for forever and I think that he's going to suffer a big adrenaline dump.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is currently the most vulnerable he has been in his career regarding his durability.
claims.quote: Holloway to me is the most vulnerable he's been in his career. You know, I know he's historically very durable. The only guy to knock him out was Tapori... We've seen him dropped in a lot of these fights recently.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's performance fades significantly once he is forced to fight on the back foot.
claims.quote: McGregor can be the the hammer early, but the minute he starts to become the nail, it all starts to fade.

claims.claim: Not cutting as much weight will improve Max Holloway's performance at 170 pounds.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor possesses a reach advantage and uses his lead hand to control distance for his left hand.
claims.quote: McGregor got the reach advantage. He does well. You know, it's an open stance battle to where he can use that lead hand to control the distance to try to snipe with the left hand.
